# `ToggleVRAM32Inc`

**Systems:** NES  
**Parameters:** `n`

***

<div markdown="0" class="trse-help-body">

Toggles 32-byte VRAM increment on or off (1 byte increment). Used together with PPUWrite, if toggled, enables 32-byte
increment.


</div>
